posts.text: I didn’t watch the #oscars tonight because I was traveling. Did the Iran war get mentioned by anyone?

Jafar Panahi 🤣


VANITY FAIR (@VanityFair)

Kevin O'Leary and Jafar Panahi share the carpet at the 2026 #Oscars 

See every arrival: vanityfair.com/hollywood/pho…

Video
  





— https://nitter.net/VanityFair/status/2033292957282099687#m

A Jewish Iranian family was supposed to receive visas to come to the US, but they were declined at the UAE embassy due to new guidelines for Iranians just days before the war. Now they’re stuck in Tehran during the war.

Their relatives asked me to make their situation public.

Humanitarian parole was how dissidents got into the United States during and after the 2022 Woman, Life, Freedom uprising. The Trump administration won’t even allow that to be an option after the massacre and now during the war…


Curtis Morrison (@curtismorrison)

Receiving inquiries from Iranian American families trying to rescue relatives using humanitarian parole, b/c: uscis.gov/humanitarian/human…
This is futile. I-131 petition decisions are on hold for Iranians (PM-602-0192/4), plus entry
